title: 11 Herbal Creams For Upset Stomach
description: Silybum marianum creams contains silymarin, a group of flavonoids and lignans, including silibinin, silidianin, and silicristin. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties and protect the stomach lining from damage caused by free radicals. Silymarin also has antioxidant properties, which help reduce inflammation and prevent cell damage in the stomach.
